summary: The diff implements both REQ-1 (backend deleteAccount function) and REQ-2 (frontend Delete Account button with confirmation dialog, localStorage clearing, logout, and error handling). Nearly all acceptance criteria are met. Two items are partially unmet: the backend returns a plain Text string instead of a typed error variant, and no explicit redirect to the landing page is visible after deletion.

missing_requirements.requirement: Calling the function when no profile exists returns an appropriate error variant
missing_requirements.reason: The backend deleteAccount function returns a plain Text string ('Account already deleted or never existed') rather than a typed Result/error variant, which does not satisfy the AC requiring an 'appropriate error variant'.

missing_requirements.requirement: The user is redirected to the landing/login page after successful deletion
missing_requirements.reason: The DeleteAccountDialog calls clear() for logout but no explicit redirect (e.g., window.location, useNavigate, or router push to landing page) is visible in the diff. Redirect behavior is not confirmed.
